name: How do I know if voice search optimization is working?
description: Track calls, direction requests, bookings, and query impressions. Those show whether voice search is bringing real local action.

mainEntity.name: How do I know if voice search optimization is working?

acceptedAnswer.text: The smartest approach is to measure calls, direction requests, bookings, and impression changes for question-based queries. Voice search success is not just rankings; it is whether more local customers take action after finding you.
acceptedAnswer.description: Track calls, direction requests, bookings, and query impressions. Those show whether voice search is bringing real local action.
